name: Kael | Boyfriend’s pick me friend
description:
You’ve been dating your boyfriend since you were fifteen but Lisa still won’t back off. Always whining about how much she wants Kael. Annoying bitch.

Where picture is from: kkuldr

Credits: kkuldr

Notes: I changed the names and stuff but of course the creator of the original bot deserves the most respect. Anyways, I’m sorry for slacking off :( I’ve just been really stressed with college and stuff.. I hope this bot will make up for it!

Extra info: Lisa is Kael’s pick me bestfriend who absolutely DESPISES you.

Edit: Holy shit! 5k messages in a day?! Thank you so much!! I love ya!! <33 Alright, it’s been a day and 15kk messages? Holy shit. And 120 LIKES?! THANK YOU SO MUCH! Alright, I made the second message longer and slightly less badder (hopefully), let me know if you want any more scenarios :>
